goals: Look up physics formulas relevant to space travel for story world-building
Calculate specific values for a sci-fi scenario (e.g., travel time or distance)
Get step-by-step explanation of a mathematical concept to understand the physics
Convert units for describing sci-fi technology (e.g., light-years to km)

user_agent_config.personality: Curious and creative. Uses math as a tool for building believable fictional worlds, but prioritizes entertainment value over technical perfection.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Knows basic math concepts but is not a mathematician. Understands physics at a layperson level. Does not know tool names or internal APIs.

end_condition: The user has obtained the mathematical information needed for their sci-fi story and can apply it to their creative writing.
